tools.name: get_business_info
tools.description: Returns business details: name, license, address, hours, phone, email, rating, and service area.

tools.name: get_author_bio
tools.description: Get the biography, credentials, expertise areas, and recent articles for a Kolmo blog author.

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search across all Kolmo content — services, projects, and blog posts — with a single keyword query. Returns ranked results grouped by type.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: Lists all residential remodeling services offered by Kolmo Construction. Supports keyword search and pagination.

tools.name: get_service
tools.description: Returns details for a specific service by slug (e.g. kitchen-remodeling, bathroom-renovation).

tools.name: list_commercial_services
tools.description: List commercial construction services. Filter by category: office, retail, industrial, hospitality, public. The public category covers government contracts — WA SEDBE #D700031098, SCS #7259, prevailing wage compliant, MRSC Small Works Roster eligible.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Lists completed construction projects with photos and descriptions. Supports keyword search, category filter, and pagination.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Returns details for a specific project by slug.

tools.name: list_blog_posts
tools.description: Lists published blog posts about Seattle home remodeling. Filterable by tag and author.

tools.name: get_blog_post
tools.description: Returns the full markdown content of a specific blog post by slug.

tools.name: submit_contact_request
tools.description: Submits a contact or quote request on behalf of a user. Supports dryRun: true to preview without submitting.

tools.name: list_project_types
tools.description: Lists all 8 supported calculator project types with required input fields.

tools.name: get_material_options
tools.description: Returns valid material IDs for flooring, paint, decking, fencing, and more.

tools.name: get_estimate
tools.description: Calculates a real-time itemized cost estimate with labor, materials, and timeline for a given project type and specifications.

tools.name: list_reviews
tools.description: Lists customer reviews and testimonials from Google and on-site sources. Filterable by source and minimum star rating.

tools.name: check_permit_requirements
tools.description: Checks whether a construction project in the Seattle area requires a permit, estimated permit cost, and official source links.

tools.name: get_material_catalog
tools.description: Browses the full material catalog with pricing — flooring, paint, decking, siding, windows, fencing, and landscaping materials.

tools.name: get_weather_window
tools.description: Checks Seattle weather forecast for the next 1-14 days and returns go/no-go recommendations for exterior construction projects.

tools.name: get_neighborhood_project_activity
tools.description: Returns completed projects by Kolmo Construction in a specific Seattle neighborhood — hyperlocal social proof with project counts, categories, and examples.

tools.name: get_project_roi
tools.description: Returns estimated return on investment for remodeling projects in the Seattle area based on Remodeling Magazine Cost vs. Value data.

tools.name: check_contractor_license_status
tools.description: Looks up any Washington State contractor's license, bond, and insurance status using public L&I data. Works for Kolmo or any competitor.

tools.name: get_financing_options
tools.description: Returns home improvement financing options with estimated monthly payments for a given project budget and credit profile.
